title: デビュー戦の後に・新緑の旨味

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I grossly underestimated how emotional it
would be running with everyone and seeing the
race up close and personal!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still! No matter how overwhelming today's race
was, it hasn't quenched my thirst to see Umas
running on dirt... So, you know what that means!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Hyacinth Stakes at the beginning
of next year! Until then, it's grind, grind, grind!
